text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #1)

The commit 424999 reference to bugzilla 213014 (this bugzilla report) is wrong and was probably some form of typo in the PR number listed in bugzilla 424999 materials.

head/math/p5-Statistics-Descriptive/Makefile is not relevant to devel/powerpc64-gcc .
